rationale.R1.1: Artifact names 'the central technical contribution of the section' but embeds it in hedged, run-on prose; the contribution claim needs to be reconstructed and evaluated on its own terms.
rationale.R1.2: Multiple logical tensions present: convergence is asserted 'in expectation' under convexity, then the non-convex case is waved away with 'addressed in part'; tense inconsistencies ('was tuned', 'were relaxed', 'was producing') obscure the chain of reasoning.
rationale.R1.3: Key empirical claims are doubly hedged ('appears to handle', 'broadly consistent', 'we believe this provides empirical support') without citing a table, figure, or appendix reference; alignment between the O(1/sqrt(T)) theory and the reported dual-gap observations is asserted but not demonstrated.
rationale.R1.6: The three paragraphs are almost entirely run-on sentences; tense shifts within single sentences undermine clarity; passive constructions and vague quantifiers ('reasonably well', 'more delicate') accumulate without resolution.
